steps.formula: \int_ {0} ^ {1} x \arcsin x \mathrm{d} x = \frac {\pi}{4} - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {1} \frac {x ^ {2}}{\sqrt {1 - x ^ {2}}} \mathrm{d} x = \frac {\pi}{4} - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {\pi}{2}} \sin^ {2} x \mathrm{d} x = \frac {\pi}{8}.

steps.formula: g ^ {\prime \prime} (c) = \lim _ {x \rightarrow c} \frac {g ^ {\prime} (x) - g ^ {\prime} (c)}{x - c} = \lim _ {x \rightarrow c} \frac {g ^ {\prime} (x)}{x - c} <   0.

steps.formula: \begin{array}{l} \text {原式} = \lim _ {a \rightarrow + 0} \frac {1}{4 a ^ {2}} \left[ \int_ {0} ^ {2 a} f (u) \mathrm{d} u - \int_ {- 2 a} ^ {0} f (u) \mathrm{d} u \right] \\ = \lim _ {a \rightarrow + 0} \frac {1}{8 a} [ 2 f (2 a) - 2 f (- 2 a) ] = \lim _ {a \rightarrow + 0} \frac {1}{4 a} [ f (2 a) - f (- 2 a) ] \\ = \lim _ {a \to + 0} \frac {1}{4} \left[ 2 f ^ {\prime} (2 a) + 2 f ^ {\prime} (- 2 a) \right] = f ^ {\prime} (0). \\ \end{array}

steps.formula: \begin{array}{l} \left| \frac {1}{2 a} \int_ {- a} ^ {a} f (t) \mathrm{d} t - f (x) \right| = \left| \frac {1}{2 a} \int_ {- a} ^ {a} [ f (t) - f (x) ] \mathrm{d} t \right| \\ \leqslant \frac {1}{2 a} \int_ {- a} ^ {a} | f (t) - f (x) | \mathrm{d} t \leqslant \frac {1}{2 a} \int_ {- a} ^ {a} (M - m) \mathrm{d} t = M - m \\ \end{array}
